_comment: Bundled fallback catalog for the Synapse MCP-server marketplace (ADR-0017). stdio servers are launched by the AI on demand; http servers run standalone and Synapse can launch + health-check them.

servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Give your AI scoped read/write access to a folder you choose.

servers.name: Memory
servers.description: A persistent knowledge graph the AI can write to and recall across sessions.

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: A structured step-by-step reasoning scratchpad for harder problems.

servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Browse repos, issues, and PRs. Needs a GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

servers.name: Playwright
servers.description: Drive a real browser — navigate, click, screenshot, scrape — from your AI.

servers.name: Fetch
servers.description: Fetch a URL and hand the AI clean markdown. Great for quick research.

servers.name: Web Scraper
servers.description: Download the first-party Web Scraper MCP + UI from GitHub, wire it into Synapse automatically, and auto-start it on Synapse launch.

servers.name: Custom HTTP server (template)
servers.description: Register your own running MCP server (e.g. a local web-scraper). Synapse health-checks it, can launch it, and wires it into your AI. Edit the URL + launch command after installing.
